calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Margaret Del Coto

Petitioner Maria Jesus Bidegain present in pro per, was sworn and examined.

The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Xarre Bidegain

Decree signed in open court.
